description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:24 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define two stages, test and deploy, and include a global before_script that runs `npm --version`, `node --version`, installs `hexo-cli` globally with `npm install hexo-cli -g`, and runs `npm install`. In the test stage add a `test` job that executes `hexo generate` and is configured to run on all branches except `master`. In the deploy stage add a `pages` job that runs `hexo generate`, installs `netlify-cli@23.7.3` globally via `npm install netlify-cli@23.7.3 -g`, checks the Netlify CLI version with `netlify --version`, and then deploys the `public/` directory to Netlify using `netlify deploy --site $NETLIFY_SITE_ID --auth $NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN --prod --dir public/`. The `pages` job publishes the `public` folder as an artifact and is limited to the `master` branch.
